map.googleKeyMissing: VITE_MAP_KEY is missing, so Google Maps cannot load
map.loadError: Google Maps failed to load. Check the API key or network

useCase.status: Package has reached the final destination

manual.title: Component Manual
manual.intro: Organize map component guidance by map type, component category, and concrete component for long-term expansion.

mapTypeDescriptions.entity: Real streets and business POI contexts
mapTypeDescriptions.visualization: Muted base map focused on data expression

manual.usageIntro: Tags summarize the scenario type; detailed guidance lives in the bullets.

placeholders.componentDescription: Add the real component name, preview, style, FakeMod, and implementation notes after design import.
placeholders.pendingBullet: Fill this after Figma MCP or component design data is connected.

pointMarker.name: Normal
pointMarker.description: Point component for location, muted, completed, emphasized, and selected states on entity maps.

style.variantSet: 4 base states distributed on the map: default / muted / completed / emphasized; hover&selected is the interaction state
style.sizes: 24px for base states; 40px for emphasized and hover/selected states
style.color: Blue for default, emphasized, and selected; gray for muted and completed, then blue emphasized styling on selection
style.shadow: White stroke plus subtle shadow for legibility on dense base maps

usage.primary: Represent user location, destination points, POI, or key logistics trace nodes.
usage.extended: Use emphasized or selected states for high-priority nodes when the map needs a clear current focus.
usage.constraints: Avoid using emphasized states for many points in the same viewport so the base map, routes, and key POI remain readable.

informatedLocation.name: Informated location
informatedLocation.description: Add preview, style, FakeMod, and implementation notes after the information-rich location design is connected.

trackingBubble.casePrimary: Show the current package node, delivery point, or exception point in a logistics trace.
trackingBubble.caseSecondary: Highlight a destination or next action in mobility, food delivery, and local courier flows.
trackingBubble.caseConstraint: Prefer one full-information bubble per viewport to avoid covering routes and key POI.

marker.casePrimary: Mark a warehouse, store, driver, or user location as a single map entity.
marker.caseSecondary: Pair with labels or clustering to represent multiple nearby POI.

routeLine.casePrimary: Represent delivery, navigation, inspection, or tracking path direction.
routeLine.caseSecondary: Use dashed styling for predicted paths, historical traces, or unconfirmed routes.
